California Final Paycheck Law 2026
Deadlines, what must be included, and how to claim if your California employer pays late.
If you were terminated
Immediately on the day of termination
If you resigned
Within 72 hours if no notice given; immediately if 72+ hours notice was provided
Was your California final paycheck late?
Enter your last day and payment date to estimate whether the paycheck missed theCalifornia deadline. This is a timing check only, not legal advice.
